description: Running a long or preemptible training job without checkpointing optimizer state, losing all progress on interruption.
body: Failure mode: a multi-hour job saves nothing (or saves weights without optimizer/scheduler state), so a preemption or crash forces a full restart or a degraded resume. Detection signals: no checkpoint files appear during training; a resume restarts the learning-rate schedule from scratch; spot-instance reclaim wipes the run. Do not run long jobs without resumable checkpoints. Safer fallback: checkpoint weights, optimizer, scheduler, and step on an interval and at best-validation, and verify a resume continues at the same loss.
